category_sources: Official GitHub description says Overarch provides a data model for holistic software-system description and supports C4 and UML diagram generation with PlantUML.
source_facts.description says it is a data-driven description of software architecture.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and repository title use Overarch.
docs_sources: Official README documentation section links Design for Overarch design information.
Official README documentation section links Usage for modelling and CLI usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/soulspace-org/overarch; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub description mentions software-system data model, C4, UML, and PlantUML.
